title: Cischweinfia pygmaea
taxonomy: Cischweinfia pygmaea is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subtribe Oncidiinae, which contains a large group of orchids. The Oncidiinae subtribe is further divided into several genera, with Cischweinfia being one of them. Cischweinfia pygmaea is native to Central and South America, where it grows in tropical and subtropical environments. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Orchidaceae family.
